Camille K. Fong, Esq., and D. Paul Bird, II, Esq., McKenna, Long & Aldridge, 415-267-4130, for defendant and moving party Metalclad Insulation Corporation
T. Scott Hames, Esq., and Benjamin Goldstein, Esq., Paul, Hanley & Harley, 510-559-9980x166, for plaintiff and opposing party Laura Sanchez

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. Plaintiff's 437c(h) motion for continuance is denied. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-03-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Jennifer Berg, Esq. for Petitioner: Laura Sanchez, present as Guardian at litem for: Elizabeth Sanchez; Jonathan Sanchez and Timothy Sanchez, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise for EACH minor is approved as follows:
Attorney's Fees $606.85
A net balance for each minor of $1,816.57 to be deposited into a blocked account with Union Bank of California, 14880 Aztec Rd., Apple Valley, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Mtn For Preference
Off Calendar Dec-21-2004 Granted Per Written Order
